title: The Island Waits for Disaster
description: On pages 13–16, this part follows Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Narrator, Shirahoshi, Royal Guards, King Neptune, Hody Jones. The core story beat is the island waits for disaster.
scene: The scene centers on the island waits for disaster, with Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Narrator, Shirahoshi, Royal Guards, King Neptune, Hody Jones driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't play dumb, you filthy pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: I hear another two young mermaids...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...Have vanished from the southern shore!! What have you done with them?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: for the love of... how would I know what happened to them?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: I mean, sure, I love mermaids so much that I'd love to abduct them, but that doesn't mean I'm the kid- napper!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You see?! He as good as admits it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hang in there, Hachi! You're gonna be all right!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Remember someone

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huh?! Sanji!! Chopper!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hey, Sanji!! Are you over the nosebleed thing already..?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's Luffy YYYYYY!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's that puffer- fish he's riding...?

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: A... are they friends of yours, Luffy-SAMA?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They're members of my pirate crew.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Look!! Their captain has arrived!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's the boss of the kid- nappers!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I cannot be seen be all those people...! Megalo, could you close your mouth a little more?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Rrh?!!...R... Rroooghhh...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmmm?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Wait up, I'm gonna head down there for a bit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Rrohh

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AaaahH!!! HH!!! He came down!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hachiii!! I thought that was you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're Wounded!! What happened?! Who did this to you?!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: That's the thing - he won't tell us anything! He just keeps saying we need to get off the island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Nyuuu... Straw hat... It's you.....

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: ...Hang on, I thought straw hat was supposed to be occupying the Royal Palace right now?!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: These guys are a bunch of dirty mermaid kidnappers... what if they're planning on kidnapping Princess Shirahoshii...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't be ridiculous...!! That's beyond impossible!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: The Princess is a giant whiting mermaid. And the beloved daughter of King Neptunee, to boot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Raug hh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hm?... What's that pufferfish...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: URGILL LHH...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Squirm

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aahhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aw, man...

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: She's huge!! And did they just say "princess"...?

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Is that the mermaid Princess?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmm? Is there someone behind me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No, Sanji!!! Whatever you do, you must not turn around!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: They've kidnapped the mermaid Princess!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If you turn around, you'll die!!

summary: The Island Waits for Disaster. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
